nasb.text: I shall offer to You burnt offerings of fat beasts, With the smoke of rams; I shall make an offering of bulls with male goats. Selah.

esv.text: I will offer to you burnt offerings of fattened animals, with the smoke of the sacrifice of rams; I will make an offering of bulls and goats. Selah

cnv.text: 我要把肥美的牲畜作燔祭， 連同公綿羊的馨香祭獻給你， 我並且要把公牛和公山羊獻上。

ccb.text: 我要献上肥美的牲畜， 以公绵羊作馨香之祭献给你， 我要献上公牛和山羊。（细拉）

csbs.text: 我要把肥畜的燔祭与公绵羊的馨香祭， 一同向你献上； 我要把公牛与公山羊， 一同献上。细拉
